initial_program:
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% Each output cell gets exactly one colour
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Gravity per column: nonzero cells fall to the bottom of their column
output(R_out, C, V) :- input(R_in, C, V), V != 0,
                       n_rows(N),
                       R_out = N - #count{ R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0, R2 >= R_in }.

% A cell receives a nonzero output iff there is such a target position
is_target(R, C) :- output(R, C, V), V != 0.

% Zero in the remaining cells
output(R, C, 0) :- output_cell(R, C), not is_target(R, C).

% Exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

#show output/3.

final_program:
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% Each output cell gets exactly one colour
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Gravity per column: nonzero cells fall to the bottom of their column
output(R_out, C, V) :- input(R_in, C, V), V != 0,
                       n_rows(N),
                       R_out = N - #count{ R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0, R2 >= R_in }.

% A cell receives a nonzero output iff there is such a target position
is_target(R, C) :- output(R, C, V), V != 0.

% Zero in the remaining cells
output(R, C, 0) :- output_cell(R, C), not is_target(R, C).

% Exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

#show output/3.
